⚔ Last War Indonesia · Official Event

FRONTLINE
CONNECT

Offline Event Series · Indonesia 2026 Offline Event Series · Indonesia 2026

Kamu bukan sekadar bermain game — kamu mewakili kotamu. Setiap Minggu, para komandan terbaik bertemu, bersaing, dan membuktikan siapa yang layak dinobatkan sebagai City Champion. Saatnya keluar dari layar dan tunjukkan kekuatanmu! You're not just playing a game — you represent your city. Every Sunday, the best commanders gather, compete, and prove who deserves to be crowned City Champion. Time to step off the screen and show your strength!

📖 PELAJARI LEBIH📖 LEARN MORE
$100 Budget per Event Budget / Event
10+ Peserta Minimum Min. Players
Gold Brick Awaits Gold Brick Awaits
TENTANG PROGRAM ABOUT THE PROGRAM

Apa Itu Frontline Connect? What Is Frontline Connect?

Program event offline resmi Last War Indonesia — mempertemukan komandan terbaik secara langsung di kotamu, berfokus pada mode Frontline Breakthrough, dengan sistem poin menuju gelar City Champion bulanan. The official Last War Indonesia offline event program — bringing the best commanders together in your city, focused on Frontline Breakthrough mode, with a monthly points system toward the City Champion title.

📍

Pertemuan FisikPhysical Gathering

Minimal 10 pemain harus hadir secara langsung di lokasi yang ditentukan penyelenggara. Event tidak boleh dijalankan secara online.A minimum of 10 players must be physically present at the organizer's chosen venue. Events cannot be run online.

🎮

Kompetisi FrontlineFrontline Competition

Peserta bersaing di mode Frontline Breakthrough dengan percobaan tak terbatas. Penyelenggara wajib mencatat dan memperbarui skor tertinggi secara real-time.Players compete in Frontline Breakthrough with unlimited tries. Organizers must record and update the highest scores in real time.

📹

Dokumentasi WajibRequired Documentation

Penyelenggara wajib merekam dan mengirimkan footage video sesuai persyaratan. Tanpa dokumentasi lengkap, reimbursement tidak dapat diproses.Organizers must capture and submit the required video footage. Without complete documentation, reimbursement cannot be processed.

📅

Jadwal MingguanWeekly Schedule

Event diadakan setiap hari Minggu. Daftar paling lambat Kamis malam. Hasil review diumumkan hari Jumat.Events are held every Sunday. Apply by Thursday evening. Results are announced on Friday.

✅

Persetujuan ResmiOfficial Approval

Kamu wajib mendapat persetujuan resmi dari admin sebelum menjalankan event. Jangan mulai tanpa konfirmasi tertulis.You must receive official approval from the admin before running your event. Do not start without written confirmation.

🏙️

City ChampionCity Champion

Poin terakumulasi tiap bulan. Kota dengan performa terbaik dinobatkan sebagai City Champion — kebanggaan untuk seluruh komunitas Last War kotamu.Points accumulate monthly. The best-performing city is crowned City Champion — glory for your entire Last War community.

CARA IKUT HOW TO JOIN

Alur Pendaftaran Registration Flow

01
FASE 1 · DAFTARPHASE 1 · APPLY

Ajukan Event-muSubmit Your Application

Isi formulir pendaftaran sebelum Kamis malam. Admin akan mereview dan mengumumkan hasilnya hari Jumat. Kamu hanya boleh lanjut setelah mendapat persetujuan resmi.Fill in the application form before Thursday evening. Admin will review and announce results on Friday. You may only proceed after receiving official approval.

  • Lengkapi data lokasi, tanggal, dan estimasi pesertaProvide venue, date, and estimated attendance
  • Setujui semua ketentuan sebelum submitAgree to all terms before submitting
  • Tunggu konfirmasi resmi dari adminWait for official admin confirmation
02
FASE 2 · JALANKANPHASE 2 · HOST

Host & RekamHost & Record

Selenggarakan acara Minggumu! Rekam semua footage yang diperlukan dan selesaikan admin checklist — catat skor dan kehadiran peserta.Run your Sunday event! Capture all required footage and complete the admin checklist — track scores and attendance.

  • Minimal 10 pemain hadir langsungAt least 10 players must attend in person
  • Catat skor Frontline Breakthrough tertinggiRecord the highest Frontline Breakthrough scores
  • Rekam semua materi video sesuai formatCapture all video materials per format
  • Ambil foto peserta dan juaraTake group and winner photos
03
FASE 3 · SUBMITPHASE 3 · SUBMIT

Kirim LaporanSubmit Report

Kirimkan footage dan materi admin pasca-event. Setelah diverifikasi, reimbursement USD00 dan hadiah pemain akan diproses.Submit footage and admin materials post-event. Once verified, your USD00 reimbursement and player prizes will be processed.

  • Upload semua materi ke Google DriveUpload all materials to Google Drive
  • Submit melalui form laporan di website iniSubmit via the report form on this website
  • Verifikasi dalam beberapa hari kerjaVerification within a few business days
INSENTIF INCENTIVES

Hadiah & Reward Prizes & Rewards

💰
$100

Organizer SupportOrganizer Support

Budget reimbursement untuk penyelenggara setelah event terverifikasi. Untuk venue, konsumsi, dan kebutuhan acara.Reimbursement budget for the organizer after event verification. For venue, catering, and event needs.

Gold Bricks

🥇 Juara 1 — 3,000 Gold Bricks
🥈 Juara 2 — 2,000 Gold Bricks
🥉 Juara 3 — 1,000 Gold Bricks
Per kota, per event. 🥇 1st Place — 3,000 Gold Bricks
🥈 2nd Place — 2,000 Gold Bricks
🥉 3rd Place — 1,000 Gold Bricks
Per city, per event.

🏆

City Champion

Poin terakumulasi tiap bulan. Kota terbaik dinobatkan sebagai City Champion — kebanggaan komunitas Last War kotamu!Points accumulate each month. The top city is crowned City Champion — pride for your entire community!

📣

Publikasi ResmiOfficial Publication

Highlight event, foto, dan footage terbaik dipublikasikan oleh tim resmi Last War Indonesia sebagai apresiasi atas kontribusimu kepada komunitas.Your event highlights, photos, and best footage will be published by the official Last War Indonesia team as appreciation for your contribution to the community.

DOKUMENTASI DOCUMENTATION

Materi yang Dibutuhkan Required Materials

Semua materi berikut wajib dikumpulkan dan dikirimkan setelah event selesai. Ini penting untuk proses verifikasi dan pencairan reimbursement. All materials below must be collected and submitted after your event ends. This is required for verification and reimbursement processing.

🏅 Foto & Profil Juara Top 3Top 3 Champion Portraits & Profiles

Ambil foto individu masing-masing juara 1, 2, dan 3. Tanyakan juga kalimat andalan atau kata-kata khas mereka untuk ditampilkan bersama foto. Take individual photos of the 1st, 2nd, and 3rd place winners. Ask each player for their personal tagline or catchphrase to display alongside their photo.

1
🪖
[Nama Juara 1]
UID: XXXXXXXX
"[Tagline / Kata Andalan]"
– – –
2
🪖
[Nama Juara 2]
UID: XXXXXXXX
"[Tagline / Kata Andalan]"
– – –
3
🪖
[Nama Juara 3]
UID: XXXXXXXX
"[Tagline / Kata Andalan]"
– – –
📹 Video FootageVideo Footage
01
⏱ 5 DETIK · 5 SECONDS

Suasana TempatVenue Atmosphere

Rekam pemandangan keseluruhan tempat acara — mulai dari meja, dekorasi, sampai suasana event. Seperti mengambil foto panorama, tapi dalam bentuk video. Tunjukkan betapa serunya tempat itu! Film a wide shot of the whole venue — the tables, decorations, and general vibe. Think of it like a panoramic photo, but as a short video clip. Show how cool the place looks!

02
⏱ 10 DETIK · 10 SECONDS

Pemain Datang & Daftar UlangPlayers Arriving & Checking In

Rekam momen saat pemain datang ke lokasi dan mendaftar di meja registrasi. Cukup tunjukkan proses masuk dan absensi — santai saja, tidak perlu kaku! Capture the moment players walk in and sign up at the registration table. Just show the arrival and check-in process — keep it natural and relaxed!

03
⏱ 20 DETIK · 20 SECONDS

Pemain Lagi Main Last WarPlayers in Action — Last War Gameplay

Rekam layar HP pemain saat bermain Last War dari dekat — pastikan game-nya terlihat jelas di layar. Ini bisa pakai fitur screen recording HP, atau direkam kamera dari depan layar. Game Last War harus terbaca dengan jelas! Film a close-up of a player's phone screen while they're playing Last War — the game must be clearly visible. You can use screen recording or film the screen directly. Last War gameplay must be clearly visible!

04
⏱ 10 DETIK · 10 SECONDS

Momen Pengumuman JuaraChampion Announcement Moment

Rekam bagian paling seru dari event — saat juara diumumkan! Tangkap reaksi peserta, sorak-sorai, dan ekspresi si pemenang. Ini adalah momen klimaks yang paling penting untuk didokumentasikan. Capture the most exciting part of the event — when the winner is announced! Get the crowd's reaction, the cheers, and the winner's expression. This is the big moment — make sure you film it!

05
⏱ 5 DETIK · 5 SECONDS

Trash Talk Top 3 ke KameraTop 3 Players' Trash Talk to Camera

Minta 3 juara teratas bicara langsung ke kamera — boleh ngomong apa saja: provokasi, bercanda, atau ekspresi kemenangan. Semakin ekspresif dan seru, semakin bagus! Ask the top 3 players to look straight at the camera and say something — trash talk, jokes, or a victory shout. The more expressive and fun, the better!

06
📸 FOTO · PHOTO

Foto Bareng Semua PesertaFull Group Photo — Everyone Together

Kumpulkan semua peserta untuk foto bersama di akhir event. Pastikan semua orang masuk frame, pencahayaan cukup terang, dan semua wajah terlihat jelas. Semakin kompak, semakin keren! Gather all participants for a group photo at the end of the event. Make sure everyone fits in the frame, the lighting is good, and all faces are clearly visible. The more energy, the better!

PASCA EVENT POST-EVENT

Kirim Laporan Event Submit Event Report

01

Upload MateriUpload Materials

Upload semua video, foto, dan data ke folder Google Drive yang telah disediakan tim admin.Upload all videos, photos, and data to the Google Drive folder provided by the admin team.

02

Isi Form LaporanFill Report Form

Lengkapi form di bawah ini dengan link Drive dan informasi event yang telah selesai.Complete the form below with your Drive link and post-event information.

03

Tunggu VerifikasiAwait Verification

Admin akan memverifikasi dalam beberapa hari kerja. Reimbursement diproses setelah konfirmasi.Admin will verify within a few business days. Reimbursement is processed after confirmation.

Link Google Drive untuk upload materi akan ditambahkan di sini. Google Drive upload link will be added here.

📁 SUBMIT LAPORAN EVENTSUBMIT EVENT REPORT

Ada Pertanyaan? Have Questions?

Hubungi kami melalui email atau bergabung ke Discord Indonesia. Di Discord, tag @Venom atau @Schuyler untuk bantuan langsung. Contact us via email or join the Indonesia Discord. On Discord, tag @Venom or @Schuyler for direct support.

⚔ Syarat PendaftaranRegistration Terms

Baca dan setujui semua ketentuan berikut sebelum melanjutkan ke formulir pendaftaran. Read and agree to all terms below before proceeding to the registration form.

Persetujuan Resmi Sebelum EventOfficial Pre-Event Approval Saya memahami bahwa saya harus mendapatkan persetujuan resmi dari admin sebelum melanjutkan penyelenggaraan event. Saya akan menunggu konfirmasi. I understand that I must receive official approval from admin before proceeding with the event. I will wait for confirmation. I understand that I must receive official approval before proceeding with the event. I will wait for approval.
Panduan Frontline ConnectFrontline Connect Guidelines Saya mengkonfirmasi bahwa saya telah membaca dan memahami panduan Frontline Connect, termasuk persyaratan event dan kewajiban pengiriman laporan. I confirm I have read and understood the Frontline Connect guidelines, including event requirements and submission obligations. I confirm that I have read and understood the Frontline Connect guidelines. I agree to the event requirements and submission obligations.
Sistem ReimbursementReimbursement System Saya mengkonfirmasi bahwa anggaran USD00 ini berbasis reimbursement — dana dibayarkan setelah event selesai dan materi terverifikasi. I confirm that the USD00 budget is reimbursement-based — funds are disbursed after the event concludes and materials are verified. I confirm this is a reimbursement-based budget (USD00 after event verification). I understand.
Izin Dokumentasi & PublikasiDocumentation & Publication Consent Semua anggota yang hadir menyetujui untuk difoto dan/atau direkam, dan mengizinkan tim Last War menggunakan konten untuk keperluan promosi resmi. All attending members agree to be photographed and/or filmed, and allow the Last War team to use the content for official promotional purposes. Members who attend agree to be photographed or filmed, and allow the Last War team to use the content for promotion.
